sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35467" key="e)neusxhmone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνευσχημονέω</orth>, <sense id="n35467.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐσχημονέω ἐν . .</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:5p.427M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5p.427M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
